```{=html}
<div class="year-banner"><div class="portrait" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div><div class="year-num">2017</div><div class="year-meta">2,572 posts this year. Showing first 300.</div></div></div>
```


<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<div id="year-months" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12"], y: [203, 147, 142, 157, 152, 211, 246, 266, 292, 294, 265, 197],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#0A2540" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 30, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      height: 210, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("year-months", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>

Jan 02, 2017  11:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Chicago murder rate is record setting - 4</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_815973752785793024" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/815973752785793024" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2017  12:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;@ CNN just released a book called &#x27;Unprecedented&#x27; which explores the 2016 race &amp; victory. Hope it does well but used worst cover photo of me!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_815989154555297792" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/815989154555297792" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2017  12:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Various media outlets and pundits say that I thought I was going to lose the election. Wrong</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_815990335318982656" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/815990335318982656" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2017  12:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I thought and felt I would win big</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_815992069412057088" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/815992069412057088" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2017  17:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;North Korea just stated that it is in the final stages of developing a nuclear weapon capable of reaching parts of the U.S. It won&#x27;t happen!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816057920223846400" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816057920223846400" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A" data-theme="china" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 02, 2017  17:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;China has been taking out massive amounts of money &amp; wealth from the U.S. in totally one-sided trade</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816068355555815424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816068355555815424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2017  06:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;General Motors is sending Mexican made model of Chevy Cruze to U.S. car dealers-tax free across border. Make in U.S.A.or pay big border tax!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Jan 03, 2017  10:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ DanScavino: Ford to scrap Mexico plant</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Jan 03, 2017  11:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Instead of driving jobs and wealth away</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816328314759606272" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816328314759606272" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2017  11:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;There should be no further releases from Gitmo. These are extremely dangerous people and should not be allowed back onto the battlefield.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816333480409833472" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816333480409833472" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2017  12:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Trump is already delivering the jobs he promised America&#x27;http://nypost.com/2017/01/01/trump-is-already-delivering-the-jobs-he-promised-america/ ‚Ä¶ ‚Äì bei Trump Tower&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816354639859871745" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816354639859871745" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2017  17:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be having a general news conference on JANUARY ELEVENTH in N.Y.C. Thank you.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816433590892429312" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816433590892429312" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 03, 2017  19:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The &#x27;Intelligence&#x27; briefing on so-called &#x27;Russian hacking&#x27; was delayed until Friday</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816452807024840704" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816452807024840704" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  06:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Julian Assange said &#x27;a 14 year old could have hacked Podesta&#x27; - why was DNC so careless? Also said Russians did not give him the info!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816620855958601730" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816620855958601730" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  07:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ FoxNews: Julian Assange on U.S. media coverage: ‚ÄúIt‚Äôs very dishonest.‚Äù # Hannity pic.twitter.com/ADcPRQifH9&#x27; More dishonest than anyone knows&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816632793862176769" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816632793862176769" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  07:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Ford for scrapping a new plant in Mexico and creating 700 new jobs in the U.S. This is just the beginning - much more to follow&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816635078067490816" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816635078067490816" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  07:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Somebody hacked the DNC but why did they not have &#x27;hacking defense&#x27; like the RNC has and why have they not responded to the terrible......&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816637064708030464" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816637064708030464" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  07:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;things they did and said (like giving the questions to the debate to H). A total double standard! Media</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816638194468999169" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816638194468999169" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  07:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Republicans must be careful in that the Dems own the failed ObamaCare disaster</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816644321768312832" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816644321768312832" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  08:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;like the 116% hike in Arizona. Also</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816645831659061248" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816645831659061248" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  08:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;massive increases of ObamaCare will take place this year and Dems are to blame for the mess. It will fall of its own weight - be careful!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816652088662958082" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816652088662958082" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  12:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Jackie Evancho&#x27;s album sales have skyrocketed after announcing her Inauguration performance.Some people just don&#x27;t understand the &#x27;Movement&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816718880731234304" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816718880731234304" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2017  05:57</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816977032433270784" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816977032433270784" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2017  06:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...do the typical political thing and BLAME. The fact is ObamaCare was a lie from the beginning.&#x27;Keep you doctor</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816977937731878912" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816977937731878912" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2017  06:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;...time for Republicans &amp; Democrats to get together and come up with a healthcare plan that really works - much less expensive &amp; FAR BETTER!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816979231217483776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816979231217483776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2017  07:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The dishonest media likes saying that I am in Agreement with Julian Assange - wrong. I simply state what he states</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816999062562107392" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816999062562107392" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2017  07:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;to make up their own minds as to the truth. The media lies to make it look like I am against &#x27;Intelligence&#x27; when in fact I am a big fan!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817004210529116160" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817004210529116160" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2017  12:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Toyota Motor said will build a new plant in Baja</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817071792711942145" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817071792711942145" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2017  18:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;How did NBC get &#x27;an exclusive look into the top secret report he (Obama) was presented?&#x27; Who gave them this report and why? Politics!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817164923843280896" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817164923843280896" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2017  18:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democratic National Committee would not allow the FBI to study or see its computer info after it was supposedly hacked by Russia......&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817166353266262016" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817166353266262016" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 05, 2017  18:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;So how and why are they so sure about hacking if they never even requested an examination of the computer servers? What is going on?&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817168818539757568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817168818539757568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2017  05:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The dishonest media does not report that any money spent on building the Great Wall (for sake of speed)</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817329823374831617" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817329823374831617" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2017  05:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hillary and the Dems were never going to beat the PASSION of my voters. They saw what was happening in the last two weeks before the......&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Jan 06, 2017  05:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;and knew they were in big trouble - which is why they cancelled their big fireworks at the last minute.THEY SAW A MOVEMENT LIKE NEVER BEFORE&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817336355193753600" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817336355193753600" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2017  06:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hopefully</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817341196251070464" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817341196251070464" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2017  06:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;being a movie star-and that was season 1 compared to season 14. Now compare him to my season 1. But who cares</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817350726800306177" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817350726800306177" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2017  08:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Anna Wintour came to my office at Trump Tower to ask me to meet with the editors of Conde Nast &amp; Steven Newhouse</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817374875962769408" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817374875962769408" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2017  10:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I am asking the chairs of the House and Senate committees to investigate top secret intelligence shared with NBC prior to me seeing it.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817413321058029568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817413321058029568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2017  13:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Monitoring the terrible situation in Florida. Just spoke to Governor Scott. Thoughts and prayers for all. Stay safe!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817453219613917185" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817453219613917185" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2017  18:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Happy Birthday @ EricTrump! https://www.facebook.com/DonaldTrump/posts/10158426170160725:0 ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817522928862502913" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817522928862502913" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 06, 2017  21:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Gross negligence by the Democratic National Committee allowed hacking to take place.The Republican National Committee had strong defense!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817579925771341825" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817579925771341825" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2017  05:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Intelligence stated very strongly there was absolutely no evidence that hacking affected the election results. Voting machines not touched!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817701436096126977" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817701436096126977" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2017  06:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Only reason the hacking of the poorly defended DNC is discussed is that the loss by the Dems was so big that they are totally embarrassed!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817703208567078913" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817703208567078913" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2017  09:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Having a good relationship with Russia is a good thing</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817748207694467072" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817748207694467072" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88" data-theme="covid" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2017  09:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;have enough problems around the world without yet another one. When I am President</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817750330196819968" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817750330196819968" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2017  09:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;both countries will</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817753083707015168" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817753083707015168" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2017  17:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulation to Jane Timken on her major upset victory in becoming the Ohio Republican Party Chair. Jane is a loyal Trump supporter &amp; star&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_817882028272128001" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/817882028272128001" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 07, 2017  20:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I look very much forward to meeting Prime Minister Theresa May in Washington in the Spring. Very nice!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818134360712953858" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818134360712953858" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2017  10:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ FoxNews: &#x27;We certainly don‚Äôt want intelligence interfering with politics and we don‚Äôt want politics interfe‚Ä¶ https://twitter.com/i/web/status/817542630682796033 ‚Ä¶&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Jan 08, 2017  10:46</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Kellyanne Conway went to @ MeetThePress this morning for an interview with @ chucktodd. Dishonest media cut out 9 of her 10 minutes. Terrible!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818136714396975104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818136714396975104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2017  12:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Before I</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818169485169410048" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818169485169410048" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 08, 2017  22:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Dishonest media says Mexico won&#x27;t be paying for the wall if they pay a little later so the wall can be built more quickly. Media is fake!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818307689323368448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818307689323368448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2017  05:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Rupert Murdoch is a great guy who likes me much better as a very successful candidate than he ever did as a very successful developer!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818416446527172608" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818416446527172608" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2017  05:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Meryl Streep</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818419002548568064" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818419002548568064" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2017  05:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hillary flunky who lost big. For the 100th time</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818421066859167746" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818421066859167746" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2017  05:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;groveling&#x27; when he totally changed a 16 year old story that he had written in order to make me look bad. Just more very dishonest media!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818422930157830144" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818422930157830144" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2017  08:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It&#x27;s finally happening - Fiat Chrysler just announced plans to invest $1BILLION in Michigan and Ohio plants</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818460862675558400" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818460862675558400" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2017  08:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Ford said last week that it will expand in Michigan and U.S. instead of building a BILLION dollar plant in Mexico. Thank you Ford &amp; Fiat C!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818461467766824961" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818461467766824961" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2017  16:32</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;An old picture with Nancy and Ronald Reagan.pic.twitter.com/8kvQ1PzPAf&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818586286034485250" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818586286034485250" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2017  20:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to all of the men and women who protect &amp; serve our communities 24/7/365! # LawEnforcementAppreciationDay https://www.facebook.com/DonaldTrump/posts/10158443103370725:0 ‚Ä¶pic.twitter.com/ySRNaF9Nvz&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818643528905621504" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818643528905621504" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2017  09:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;U.S. Small-Business Optimism Index Surges by Most Since 1980&#x27;https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2017-01-10/u-s-small-business-optimism-index-surges-by-most-since-1980 ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818841421364989952" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818841421364989952" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2017  14:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Small business optimism soars after Trump election&#x27;http://www.cnbc.com/2017/01/10/small-business-optimism-soars-after-trump-election.html ‚Ä¶ ‚Äì bei Trump Tower&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818922995980845056" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818922995980845056" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2017  16:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;Trump Helps Lift Small Business Confidence to 12-Yr. High&#x27; http://bit.ly/2j5gad2FOXBusiness ‚Ä¶pic.twitter.com/CWAvJ4fRdx ‚Äì bei Trump Tower&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_818948254943604736" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/818948254943604736" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 10, 2017  20:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;BuzzFeed Runs Unverifiable Trump-Russia Claims&#x27; # FakeNewshttp://www.lifezette.com/polizette/buzzfeed-runs-error-laden-unverifiable-trump-russia-claim/ ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_819000924207251456" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/819000924207251456" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2017  06:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Russia just said the unverified report paid for by political opponents is &#x27;A COMPLETE AND TOTAL FABRICATION</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_819155311793700865" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/819155311793700865" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2017  06:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Russia has never tried to use leverage over me. I HAVE NOTHING TO DO WITH RUSSIA - NO DEALS</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_819159806489591809" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/819159806489591809" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2017  06:44</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I win an election easily</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_819162968592183298" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/819162968592183298" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2017  06:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Intelligence agencies should never have allowed this fake news to &#x27;leak&#x27; into the public. One last shot at me.Are we living in Nazi Germany?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_819164172781060096" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/819164172781060096" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2017  22:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We had a great News Conference at Trump Tower today. A couple of FAKE NEWS organizations were there but the people truly get what&#x27;s going on&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_819393877174087682" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/819393877174087682" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 11, 2017  22:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ zhu_amy3: @ realDonaldTrump It&#x27;s Morning in America again!!! Thank you President-Elect Donald Trump!!! So proud of you!!!!&#x27; THANKS!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_819399723924803585" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/819399723924803585" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 12, 2017  06:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;James Clapper called me yesterday to denounce the false and fictitious report that was illegally circulated. With all of the jobs I am bringing back to our Nation</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_820631495660408835" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/820631495660408835" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40" data-theme="economy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2017  08:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;will only get higher. Car companies and others</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_820632299037409280" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/820632299037409280" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2017  14:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Bob Woodward who said</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_820723387995717632" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/820723387995717632" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 15, 2017  14:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;about that...Those Intelligence chiefs made a mistake here</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Thanks Alabama!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_821719763214880769" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/821719763214880769" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_821772494864580614" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/821772494864580614" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_821844875268255744" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/821844875268255744" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot;
