It was an honor to be with them tonight in D.C. # Heroes https://www.facebook.com/DonaldTrump/posts/10158502102660725:0 ‚Ä¶pic.twitter.com/wFXlWQ0XRr&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_821930600290521089" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/821930600290521089" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #997A2E" data-theme="trade" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2017  06:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;It wasn&#x27;t Donald Trump that divided this country</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822064153426857984" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822064153426857984" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2017  07:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Getting ready to leave for Washington</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822066132307808256" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822066132307808256" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2017  07:02</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;the American people. I have no doubt that we will</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822066653953458177" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822066653953458177" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2017  14:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;On my way! # Inauguration2017https://twitter.com/trumpinaugural/status/822142520473829377 ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822175285151928320" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822175285151928320" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2017  14:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great Concert at 4:00 P.M. today at Lincoln Memorial. Enjoy!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822176438627536897" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822176438627536897" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2017  14:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Join me at 4pm over at the Lincoln Memorial with my family! # Inauguration2017https://twitter.com/trumpinaugural/status/822161617425203203 ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822177206633955328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822177206633955328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2017  18:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you for joining us at the Lincoln Memorial tonight- a very special evening! Together</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822242449053614081" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822242449053614081" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 19, 2017  22:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you for a wonderful evening in Washington</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822298747421986828" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822298747421986828" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  06:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It all begins today! I will see you at 11:00 A.M. for the swearing-in. THE MOVEMENT CONTINUES - THE WORK BEGINS!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822421390125043713" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822421390125043713" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A" data-theme="military" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  11:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Today we are not merely transferring power from one Administration to another</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822501803615014918" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822501803615014918" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  11:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;power from Washington</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822501939267141634" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822501939267141634" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  11:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;What truly matters is not which party controls our government</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822502135233384448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822502135233384448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  11:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;January 20th 2017</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822502270503972872" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822502270503972872" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  11:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The forgotten men and women of our country will be forgotten no longer. From this moment on</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822502450007515137" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822502450007515137" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  11:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We will bring back our jobs. We will bring back our borders. We will bring back our wealth - and we will bring back our dreams!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822502601304526848" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822502601304526848" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  11:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We will follow two simple rules: BUY AMERICAN &amp; HIRE AMERICAN! # InaugurationDay # MAGA&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822502887477673984" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822502887477673984" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  11:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It is time to remember that...https://www.facebook.com/DonaldTrump/posts/10158510858055725 ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822503558369181697" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822503558369181697" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  12:00</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;So to all Americans</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822504142178500608" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822504142178500608" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  12:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;TO ALL AMERICANS https://www.facebook.com/DonaldTrump/posts/10158510987625725 ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822507434396753921" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822507434396753921" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 20, 2017  22:56</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;THANK YOU for another wonderful evening in Washington</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822669114237943808" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822669114237943808" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2017  05:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A fantastic day and evening in Washington D.C.Thank you to @ FoxNews and so many other news outlets for the GREAT reviews of the speech!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_822774162011910144" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/822774162011910144" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2017  06:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Had a great meeting at CIA Headquarters yesterday</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_823146987117772800" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/823146987117772800" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2017  06:47</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Watched protests yesterday but was under the impression that we just had an election! Why didn&#x27;t these people vote? Celebs hurt cause badly.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_823150055418920960" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/823150055418920960" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2017  06:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Wow</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_823151124815507460" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/823151124815507460" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2017  08:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Peaceful protests are a hallmark of our democracy. Even if I don&#x27;t always agree</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_823174199036542980" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/823174199036542980" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 23, 2017  05:38</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Busy week planned with a heavy focus on jobs and national security. Top executives coming in at 9:00 A.M. to talk manufacturing in America.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_823495059010109440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/823495059010109440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2017  05:11</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Will be meeting at 9:00 with top automobile executives concerning jobs in America. I want new plants to be built here for cars sold here!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_823850781946343427" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/823850781946343427" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2017  10:58</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A photo delivered yesterday that will be displayed in the upper/lower press hall. Thank you Abbas!pic.twitter.com/Uzp0ivvRp0&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_823937936056008704" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/823937936056008704" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2017  11:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great meeting with automobile industry leaders at the @ WhiteHouse this morning. Together</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_823939422743830528" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/823939422743830528" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #B08030" data-theme="energy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2017  11:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Signing orders to move forward with the construction of the Keystone XL and Dakota Access pipelines in the Oval Office.pic.twitter.com/OErGmbBvYK ‚Äì bei The Oval Office&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_823950814163140609" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/823950814163140609" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; They were many times higher than FAKE NEWS @ CNN - public is smart!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824078417213747200" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824078417213747200" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2017  20:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If Chicago doesn&#x27;t fix the horrible &#x27;carnage&#x27; going on</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824080766288228352" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824080766288228352" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 24, 2017  20:37</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Big day planned on NATIONAL SECURITY tomorrow. Jan 25, 2017  16:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be interviewed by @ DavidMuir tonight at 10 o&#x27;clock on @ ABC. Will be my first interview from the White House. Enjoy!pic.twitter.com/okiZ8ZeDgz ‚Äì bei The White House&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824377804590563339" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824377804590563339" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 25, 2017  18:03</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Beginning today</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824407390674157568" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824407390674157568" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 25, 2017  20:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;As your President</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824440456813707265" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824440456813707265" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 25, 2017  20:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27; @ romoabcnews: . @ DavidMuir first @ POTUS interview since taking office. Tonight on @ ABCWorldNews @ ABC2020 tonight. pic.twitter.com/I4Vz1mRdBK&#x27;&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824448156935081984" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824448156935081984" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 25, 2017  20:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Interview with David Muir of @ ABC News in 10 minutes. Enjoy!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824448880993509376" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824448880993509376" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2017  05:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Ungrateful TRAITOR Chelsea Manning</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824573698774601729" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824573698774601729" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #997A2E" data-theme="trade" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2017  07:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The U.S. has a 60 billion dollar trade deficit with Mexico. It has been a one-sided deal from the beginning of NAFTA with massive numbers...&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824615820391305216" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824615820391305216" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2017  07:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;of jobs and companies lost. If Mexico is unwilling to pay for the badly needed wall</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824616644370714627" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824616644370714627" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2017  13:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Spoke at the Congressional @ GOP Retreat in Philadelphia</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824698743630995457" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824698743630995457" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2017  17:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Will be interviewed by @ SeanHannity on @ FoxNews at 10:00pm tonight. Enjoy!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824765229527605248" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824765229527605248" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 26, 2017  17:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Miami-Dade Mayor drops sanctuary policy. Right decision. Strong!http://www.miamiherald.com/news/local/community/miami-dade/article128984759.html ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824767281146245120" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824767281146245120" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72" data-theme="elections" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2017  07:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Look forward to seeing final results of VoteStand. Gregg Phillips and crew say at least 3</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824968416486387713" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824968416486387713" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2017  07:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Mexico has taken advantage of the U.S. for long enough. Massive trade deficits &amp; little help on the very weak border must change</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_824970003153842176" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/824970003153842176" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2017  10:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The # MarchForLife is so important. To all of you marching --- you have my full support!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_825017279209410561" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/825017279209410561" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 27, 2017  10:30</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;. @ VP Mike Pence will be speaking at today&#x27;s # MarchForLife -- You have our full support!https://twitter.com/vp/status/824757313441525761 ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; We will ALWAYS be with you!pic.twitter.com/D0aOWhOH4X&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_825127844066054144" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/825127844066054144" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 28, 2017  07:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The failing @ nytimes has been wrong about me from the very beginning. Said I would lose the primaries</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Jan 29, 2017  17:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I will be interviewed by @ TheBrodyFile on @ CBNNews tonight at 11pm. Enjoy!&quot;</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_825850987348914184" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/825850987348914184" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2017  06:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Only 109 people out of 325</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826041397232943104" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826041397232943104" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2017  06:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;protesters and the tears of Senator Schumer. Secretary Kelly said that all is going well with very few problems. MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826042483155013632" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826042483155013632" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2017  06:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;There is nothing nice about searching for terrorists before they can enter our country. This was a big part of my campaign. Study the world!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826044059647107073" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826044059647107073" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2017  07:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If the ban were announced with a one week notice</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826060143825666051" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826060143825666051" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2017  07:43</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I have made my decision on who I will nominate for The United States Supreme Court. It will be announced live on Tuesday at 8:00 P.M. (W.H.)&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826063267760046080" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826063267760046080" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2017  08:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Where was all the outrage from Democrats and the opposition party (the media) when our jobs were fleeing our country?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826073437735100418" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826073437735100418" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2017  15:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The American dream is back. We‚Äôre going to create an environment for small business like we haven‚Äôt had in many</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826175120238604288" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826175120238604288" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 30, 2017  18:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The Democrats are delaying my cabinet picks for purely political reasons. They have nothing going but to obstruct. Now have an Obama A.G.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826229971584708608" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826229971584708608" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 31, 2017  05:21</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Nancy Pelosi and Fake Tears Chuck Schumer held a rally at the steps of The Supreme Court and mic did not work (a mess)-just like Dem party!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826390034693623809" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826390034693623809" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 31, 2017  05:27</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;When will the Democrats give us our Attorney General and rest of Cabinet! They should be ashamed of themselves! No wonder D.C. doesn&#x27;t work!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826391334248407040" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826391334248407040" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 31, 2017  18:31</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Getting ready to deliver a VERY IMPORTANT DECISION! 8:00 P.M.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826588658304217088" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826588658304217088" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 31, 2017  19:01</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Join me live from the @ WhiteHouse.https://www.facebook.com/POTUS/videos/1240366106032827/ ‚Ä¶&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826596187453153281" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826596187453153281" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 31, 2017  21:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Hope you like my nomination of Judge Neil Gorsuch for the United States Supreme Court. He is a good and brilliant man</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826637556787838976" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826637556787838976" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Feb 01, 2017  01:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“President Trump&#x27;s Nominee for the Supreme Court Neil M. Gorsuch. 
#SCOTUS #JusticeGorsuch 
https://t.co/OnnJxv0sNG”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826599964168040448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/826599964168040448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 01, 2017  06:50</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Everybody is arguing whether or not it is a BAN. Call it what you want</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826774668245946368" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826774668245946368" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 01, 2017  21:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Iran is rapidly taking over more and more of Iraq even after the U.S. has squandered three trillion dollars there. Obvious long ago!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_826990079738540033" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/826990079738540033" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 01, 2017  21:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Do you believe it? The Obama Administration agreed to take thousands of illegal immigrants from Australia. Why? I will study this dumb deal!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827002559122567168" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827002559122567168" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 02, 2017  05:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;If U.C. Berkeley does not allow free speech and practices violence on innocent people with a different point of view - NO FEDERAL FUNDS?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827112633224544256" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827112633224544256" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 02, 2017  05:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations to Rex Tillerson on being sworn in as our new Secretary of State. He will be a star!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827113926517194757" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827113926517194757" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 02, 2017  05:25</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Attending Chief Ryan Owens&#x27; Dignified Transfer yesterday with my daughter Ivanka was my great honor. To a great and brave man - thank you!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Feb 02, 2017  05:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Iran has been formally PUT ON NOTICE for firing a ballistic missile.Should have been thankful for the terrible deal the U.S. made with them!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827118012784373760" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827118012784373760" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 02, 2017  05:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Iran was on its last legs and ready to collapse until the U.S. came along and gave it a life-line in the form of the Iran Deal: $150 billion&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827119326880813056" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827119326880813056" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 02, 2017  11:29</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827207267632164868" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827207267632164868" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6B6B6B" data-theme="general" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2017  05:24</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Yes</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827477947154063361" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827477947154063361" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2017  05:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Iran is playing with fire - they don&#x27;t appreciate how &#x27;kind&#x27; President Obama was to them. Not me!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827478751931924480" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827478751931924480" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2017  05:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Prime Minister of Australia for telling the truth about our very civil conversation that FAKE NEWS media lied about. Very nice!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827480386120929280" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827480386120929280" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2017  05:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Meeting with biggest business leaders this morning. Good jobs are coming back to U.S.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827482059438432260" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827482059438432260" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #7A3030" data-theme="crime" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2017  05:48</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Professional anarchists</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827483841589891073" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827483841589891073" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2017  06:51</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;A new radical Islamic terrorist has just attacked in Louvre Museum in Paris. Tourists were locked down. France on edge again. GET SMART U.S.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827499871011819520" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827499871011819520" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2017  17:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;We must keep &#x27;evil&#x27; out of our country!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827655062835052544" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827655062835052544" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #997A2E" data-theme="trade" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2017  21:07</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Countries charge U.S. companies taxes or tariffs while the U.S. charges them nothing or little.We should charge them SAME as they charge us!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #A63D2A">China</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #415B6F">Foreign Policy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827715246135574530" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827715246135574530" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 04, 2017  06:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;When a country is no longer able to say who can</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827864176043376640" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827864176043376640" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 04, 2017  07:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Interesting that certain Middle-Eastern countries agree with the ban. They know if certain people are allowed in it&#x27;s death &amp; destruction!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827865957750161408" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827865957750161408" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 04, 2017  07:12</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The opinion of this so-called judge</div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827867311054974976" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827867311054974976" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 04, 2017  07:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;After being forced to apologize for its bad and inaccurate coverage of me after winning the election</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827874208021639168" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827874208021639168" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 04, 2017  08:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827885966509604865" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827885966509604865" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; (prior to Super Bowl). Bad people are very happy!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_828042506851934209" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/828042506851934209" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D" data-theme="courts" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2017  14:39</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just cannot believe a judge would put our country in such peril. If something happens blame him and court system. People pouring in. Bad!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_828342202174668800" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/828342202174668800" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A" data-theme="border" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2017  14:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I have instructed Homeland Security to check people coming into our country VERY CAREFULLY. The courts are making the job very difficult!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #7A3030">Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_828343072840900610" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/828343072840900610" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2017  16:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Enjoy the # SuperBowl and then we continue: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_828375073006444544" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/828375073006444544" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #C9A961" data-theme="nicknames_good" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 05, 2017  21:36</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;What an amazing comeback and win by the Patriots.
