Feb 12, 2017  20:14</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;While on FAKE NEWS @CNN</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4B6A88">COVID / Health</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_830751875578355713" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/830751875578355713" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2017  21:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;After two days of very productive talks</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_830764596235485188" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/830764596235485188" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F" data-theme="nicknames_bad" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2017  21:23</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;I know Mark Cuban well. He backed me big-time but I wasn&#x27;t interested in taking all of his calls.He&#x27;s not smart enough to run for president!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_830769247185952772" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/830769247185952772" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 12, 2017  23:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Congratulations Stephen Miller- on representing me this morning on the various Sunday morning shows. Great job!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_830804130692268032" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/830804130692268032" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 13, 2017  06:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Just leaving Florida. Very dishonest!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_830904083519242241" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/830904083519242241" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 13, 2017  23:53</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Today I will meet with Canadian PM Trudeau and a group of leading business women to discuss women in the workforce. https://t.co/bFAHPRXHdP&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #C9A961">Good Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831169341358014475" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831169341358014475" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 14, 2017  00:59</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Welcome to the @WhiteHouse Prime Minister @JustinTrudeau! Humana to pull out in 2018. Will repeal</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831636777110757377" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831636777110757377" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 15, 2017  19:40</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The fake news media is going crazy with their conspiracy theories and blind hatred. @MSNBC &amp;amp; @CNN are unwatchable. @foxandfriends is great!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6B3F72">Elections &amp; Voting</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831830548565852160" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831830548565852160" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 15, 2017  20:08</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This Russian connection non-sense is merely an attempt to cover-up the many mistakes made in Hillary Clinton&#x27;s losing campaign.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831837514226921472" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831837514226921472" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 15, 2017  20:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Information is being illegally given to the failing @nytimes &amp;amp; @washingtonpost by the intelligence community (NSA and FBI?).Just like Russia&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831840306161123328" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831840306161123328" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 15, 2017  20:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Eli Lake of The Bloomberg View - &#x27;The NSA &amp;amp; FBI...should not interfere in our politics...and is&#x27; Very serious situation for USA&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831842652085686273" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831842652085686273" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #415B6F" data-theme="foreign_policy" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 15, 2017  20:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Crimea was TAKEN by Russia during the Obama Administration. Was Obama too soft on Russia?&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #3F5F7F">Media</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831846101179314177" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831846101179314177" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F" data-theme="media" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 15, 2017  21:13</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;The real scandal here is that classified information is illegally given out by &#x27;intelligence&#x27; like candy. Very un-American!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5D3A5D">Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831853862281699331" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831853862281699331" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A" data-theme="personal_family" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2017  00:34</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great listening session with CEO&#x27;s of the Retail Industry Leaders Association this morning! https://t.co/sy6xJcWfcF&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #5E7A4C">Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831904516316479489" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831904516316479489" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A" data-theme="rallies" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2017  03:17</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Welcome to the United States</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2F5F5F">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #6E4C7A">Personal &amp; Family</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831945670324060164" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831945670324060164" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C" data-theme="lifestyle" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2017  03:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Join me in Florida this Saturday at 5pm for a rally at the Orlando-Melbourne International Airport! Tickets:… https://t.co/OigfXFECPp&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_831952535544070145" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/831952535544070145" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div><script src="../assets/filter.js"></script>
